title: Salty Silky Malaysian Fiordilatte Nori-Wrapped
description: A romantic pescatarian-friendly dish featuring silky Fiordilatte and nori-wrapped, perfect for a special evening meal.
instructions: Rehydrate the shiitake mushrooms in 1 cup of coconut water for 30 minutes.
Drain the rehydrated mushrooms and chop them into small pieces.
Grate the ginger and mince the garlic.
In a molcajete, mix together the chopped mushrooms, grated ginger, minced garlic, 1 tsp of salt, and 1/4 tsp of black pepper.
Add 2 oz of the Fiordilatte cheese to the molcajete and mix until well combined.
Heat 1 tbsp of sesame oil in a small pan over medium heat.
Add the Fiordilatte cheese mixture to the pan and cook until the cheese is melted and the mixture is hot, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, toast the nori sheets by placing them on a baking sheet and baking in a preheated oven at 350°F for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
To assemble the dish, place a toasted nori sheet on a plate, then place a spoonful of the Fiordilatte cheese mixture onto the nori sheet.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
Serve the nori-wrapped Fiordilatte cheese mixture with a side of lime wedges and additional coconut water for dipping.
Garnish with additional grated ginger and sesame seeds, if desired.
